CreateAzureDatabricksStorageRequest.description: The request payload for creating an AzureDatabricksStorage.

displayName.description: The AzureDatabricksStorage display name. The display name must follow naming rules according to the item type.

description.description: The AzureDatabricksStorage description. Maximum length is 256 characters.

folderId.description: The folder ID. If not specified or null, the AzureDatabricksStorage is created with the workspace as its folder.

sensitivityLabelSettings.description: The sensitivity label settings for the AzureDatabricksStorage.

UpdateAzureDatabricksStorageDefinitionRe.description: The request payload for updating an AzureDatabricksStorage's public definition.

AzureDatabricksStorageDefinitionResponse.description: The response containing an AzureDatabricksStorage's public definition.

AzureDatabricksStorageDefinition.description: AzureDatabricksStorage public definition object. Refer to this [article](/rest/api/fabric/articles/item-management/definitions/azure-databricks-storage-definition) for more details on the structure of the AzureDatabricksStorage definition.

format.description: The format of the AzureDatabricksStorage definition. Additional AzureDatabricksStorageFormat types may be added over time.

values.description: Custom format for the AzureDatabricksStorage definition.

path.description: The AzureDatabricksStorage public definition part path.

payload.description: The AzureDatabricksStorage public definition part payload.

UpdateAzureDatabricksStorageRequest.description: The request payload for updating an AzureDatabricksStorage.

displayName.description: The AzureDatabricksStorage display name. The display name must follow naming rules according to item type.

description.description: The AzureDatabricksStorage description. Maximum length is 256 characters.
